questionHtml:
What describes HPO42−?

A.     Amphiprotic but not amphoteric

B.     Amphoteric but not amphiprotic

C.     Amphiprotic and amphoteric

D.     Neither amphiprotic nor amphoteric

meta.title: What describes HPO42−? A. Amphiprotic but not amphoteric B. Amphoteric but not amphiprotic C. Amphiprotic and amphoteric D. Neither amphiprotic nor amphoteric
